title: SIGSEGV in MANIFOLDjob
poc: select (t-(select timestamp '1970-1-1')),v from foo union all select (t-(select timestamp '1970-1-1')),null from foo;
key_bug_features: selecting null values in union query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
SELECT id, name FROM bar UNION ALL SELECT id, NULL FROM bar;
SELECT (created_at - (SELECT TIMESTAMP '1970-1-1')), name FROM bar UNION ALL SELECT (created_at - (SELECT TIMESTAMP '1970-1-1')), NULL FROM bar;
